labels.shortDescription: Fill in your Quote Payment and Delivery Terms
labels.value: Please, fill in your Quote Payment and Delivery Terms information to generate PDF document.
Answer received, but failed to be processed
BO Specialist doesn't defined. Please, specify BO Specialist for this opportunity.
BO Specialist email doesn't defined. Please, specify email for BO Specialist for this opportunity.
Opportunity Owner didn't have ERP ID field populated, please contact system administrator.

labels.shortDescription: No Payment or Delivery Terms on Quote
labels.value: Payment Terms or Delivery Terms are Empty!
Account might be blocked during 3 days. Click to review Account.
Account might be blocked during 7 days. Click to review Account
will be blocked in 7 days. To avoid your account getting into Stop List, please ask the client to pay the outstanding balance
will be blocked in 3 days. To avoid your account getting into Stop List, please ask the client to pay the outstanding balance
Opportunity was already sent to Backoffice
Sorry, there is no shipping information for this order yet.

labels.shortDescription: Please, select at least one order
labels.value: Please select at least one order
Sorry. You can't add product to non Draft reclamation.
There is an issue connecting to ERP'

labels.value: Sorry, you can not delete confirmed enquiry

labels.value: Sorry, you cannot edit confirmed enquiry

This is a required entry. At least 1 row must be selected.

labels.shortDescription: Showing Page x of y Pages input label middle
Showing Page x of y Pages input label prefix
Showing Page x of y Pages input label suffix
Help Text for Filter Blank Checkbox
labels.value: Check here if you want to filter rows where the value in this column is blank

Use parentheses, AND, OR, and NOT to customize the logic. For example, if you enter “(1 AND 2 AND 3) OR 4”, the flow evaluates whether the first three conditions are true or only the fourth condition is true.
You provided an unsupported value for the DataTypeFilter input on Object and Field Picker. Currently the only supported value is ’picklist’
You don\'t have the proper permissions for ths action
"Manager APEX Class" can not be empty
There are multiple groups for that role
Sharing Settings must be private or public read/write to enable manual sharing
Only the record owner or administrators can modify permissions
Your search found more than 200 results. Keep typing to make it more specific
A password change link has been sent to your email!
If you don't see the email, check your spam folder or contact support.
Are you sure you want to reset password? A password change link will be sent to your email! Session will be closed. If you will not see the email, check your spam folder or contact support.
Write theme for suport ticket, please.
Are you sure you want to exit?

labels.shortDescription: will not be able to place an order
labels.value: You will not be able to place an order if the debt is not paid by
